assertions.name: NightwatchAssertError
assertions.message:
Failed [equal]: (Device setup failed — device may not be connected: Unable to connect to "http://localhost:4723/", make sure browser driver is running on that address.
It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections.) - expected [32m"null"[39m but got: [31m"Error: Unable to connect to "http://localhost:4723/", make sure browser driver is running on that address.[39m
[31mIt seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections.[39m

[31m    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)[39m
[31m    at async _WebDriver.newSession (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriver/build/node.js:1753:41)[39m
[31m    at async remote (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:9979:20)[39m

assertions.failure:
Expected "null" but got: "Error: Unable to connect to "http://localhost:4723/", make sure browser driver is running on that address.
It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections."

Should launch the Keyless app in POCO.failure:

It seems like the service failed to start or is rejecting any connections."
